title: Creative Deduplication
description: Policy for whether the same creative may appear on multiple placements within a single newsletter sendout

enumDescriptions.required: Each placement in the same sendout must show a distinct creative. The seller will reject a media buy that assigns the same creative to multiple placements.
enumDescriptions.preferred: The publisher prefers distinct creatives across placements but will accept duplicates if the buyer has limited creative assets.
enumDescriptions.none: No restrictions. The same creative may appear on any or all placements within the same sendout.
